title: Resolution Extending Deepest Sympathy and Condolences to the Family, Relatives and Friends of Former Mayor of the Municipality of Bay Honorable Bruno T. Ramos, Who Joined His Maker Last August 30, 2021. (AUTHOR (S): Councilor (s) Miko C. Pelegrina, Janos S. Lapiz, Geronimo A. Ciceron, Marlo Pj A. Alipon, Mike Dexter A. Concio, Mark Lester B. Dizon, Cris Dayril B. Bagnes, Rodora P. Loares, Arlene P. Delos Santos, 09/13/2021)
